description: An invoice — accounts receivable record with line items, amounts, and payment tracking. Created by Ophan's create_invoice tool.

context_schema.issuer: string — issuer name or artifact ID
context_schema.recipient: string — recipient name or artifact ID
context_schema.line_items: object[] — [{description: string, quantity: number, unit_price: string, amount: string}]
context_schema.total: string — total amount as a decimal string

ui.label: Invoice
ui.description: Invoice — accounts receivable with line items and payment status.
